subcodes.first_line: O Name of God! Hearken unto the call of Him Who summoneth thee in truth, and be not of the heedless ones. He it is Who sent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسم الله اسمع ندآء من ینادیک بالحق و لاتکن من الغافلین هو الذی ارسل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
